source.name: file.inc
source.title: file.inc
source.description: Handler for generating the source documentation
source.param: item (string) the path to the source file
source.organisation: MIOLO - Miolo Development Team - UNIVATES Centro Universitario
source.legal: CopyLeft (L) 2001-2002 UNIVATES, Lajeado/RS - Brasil Licensed under GPL (see COPYING.TXT or FSF at www.fsf.org for further details)

class.name: SourceDocumentation
class.description:
This class generates documentation for a PHP source file. It is assumed, that the documentation is included in special comment blocks.

In either case, a skeleton of the source code will be generated.
class.example:
#+++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++ # Documentation comment block #-------------------------------------------------------------------
File Level Documentation Block
#+++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++ # @title # Form and Form Elements # # @description # This file contains the form and form elements definitions # # @see # miolo/ui/tabbedform.class, # miolo/ui/themepainter.class # # @topics form, ui # # @created 2001/08/14 # # @organisation # MIOLO - Miolo Development Team - UNIVATES Centro Universitario # # @legal # CopyLeft (L) 2001-2002 UNIVATES, Lajeado/RS - Brasil # Licensed under GPL (see COPYING.TXT or FSF at www.fsf.org for # further details) # # @contributors # Thomas Spriestersbach [author] [ts@interact2000.com.br] # Vilson Cristiano Gartner [author] [vgartner@univates.br] # # @maintainers # Thomas Spriestersbach [author] [ts@interact2000.com.br] # Vilson Cristiano Gartner [author] [vgartner@univates.br] # # @history # $Log: modules_common_handlers_doc_file.xml,v $ # Revision 1.2 2002/09/05 00:59:16 vgartner # project maintenance for CVS # # # @id $Id: modules_common_handlers_doc_file.xml,v 1.2 2002/09/05 00:59:16 vgartner Exp $ #-------------------------------------------------------------------
Class Level Documentation Block
#+++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++ # Class level documentation block. At this level, one would provide # a generalized description of the class. Perhaps one would like # emphasize some methods or related classes. # # You can embed example code directly in the documentation block. # To achieve this, use the @example tag. The text in # this description is kind of an example tag. #-------------------------------------------------------------------
Method/Function Level Documentation Block
#+++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++ # # # # # # #-------------------------------------------------------------------

function.name: SourceDocumentation
function.description: Constructor of the class. It takes as parameter $source a string containing the full path to a PHP source file, for which to generate the documentation.

function.name: Generate
function.description: Overrides the ThemeElement's Generate function, which is used to produce the HTML output for this class.

function.name: Update
function.description:
The Update method will generate the related documentation files or return the path to the static html file if nothing has changed in the meantime.

All parsing/processing to produce the documentation outout is done in this method.

In fact: this method produces three output files from parsing the php source:
  • an XML file containing the skeleton of the source.
  • an DIA file containing the UML diagram definition of the source using the doc2dia.xslt stylesheet.
  • an HTML file containing the HTML output of the applied doc2html.xslt stylesheet.
